task_completion.description: The DICOM image is opened and displayed in a viewer application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A medical image viewer or image editor is open, displaying a grayscale image with a bright spot in the lower right center.

task_completion.description: The bright lesion in the lower right center is encircled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A drawn circle or ellipse surrounds the bright, distinct lesion in the lower right center of the image.

task_completion.description: A label reading 'URGENT' is added to the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'URGENT' is visible on the image, typically near the encircled lesion.

task_completion.description: Both the encircling annotation and the text label are colored red.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drawn shape and the text 'URGENT' are distinctly red against the grayscale image background.

task_completion.description: The annotated image is exported as a JPEG to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog shows the file being saved as 'urgent_finding.jpg' in the directory '/home/ga/DICOM/exports' or '~/DICOM/exports', or a terminal/file manager confirms the file exists at this path.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical application to view and annotate the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the UI of an image viewer or editor (e.g., selecting drawing tools, color palettes).

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export or save feature rather than a terminal command to generate the final image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of a save/export dialog from the GUI application, rather than terminal commands like 'convert' or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not generate a synthetic image from scratch using a script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The underlying image being annotated is the actual DICOM image provided, viewed in a standard application, rather than a script being written to generate an image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is /home/ga/DICOM/exports/urgent_finding.jpg. The text label must exactly read 'URGENT'. Both the text and the encircling annotation must be RED. The output file must be a valid image (size > 5000 bytes).
